HGSS.506.0000:
Fufufufu...
I’m sorry to disappoint you...\f
I’m only joking! I’m the real deal!\f
Janine of Fuchsia Gym, that’s me!\f
HGSS.506.0001:
Janine: I see... You have defeated
Koga, my father and a member of the\r
Elite Four, to come here.\f
No wonder you are strong!\f
You’ve definitely won...
Here’s the Soul Badge. Take it.\f
HGSS.506.0002:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Soul Badge from Janine!
HGSS.506.0003:
Janine: You’re so tough!
I have a special gift!\f
It’s Poison Jab, a powerful Poison-type
move that may poison its victim.\f
HGSS.506.0004:
Janine: I’m going to really apply
myself and improve my skills.\f
I want to become much better than
both my father and you!
HGSS.506.0005:
Yo, legend in the making!
Whoops! Take a good look around you.\f
The Trainers all look like the
Gym Leader, Janine.\f
Which of them is the real Janine?
HGSS.506.0006:
That was a great battle,
Trainer from Johto!
HGSS.506.0010:
That’s right, I’m a boy!
What’s wrong with a boy\r
dressing up as Janine?
HGSS.506.0011:
Fufufu!\f
I’m Janine, the Gym Leader!\r
Wait, no I’m not! Gotcha!\f
HGSS.506.0013:
It’s so fun to dress up as Janine,
our idol!
HGSS.506.0014:
I’m Janine!
How did you know I was real?\r
Let’s battle!\f
HGSS.506.0016: I feel stronger dressing up as Janine.
HGSS.506.0018:
Fuchsia City Pokémon Gym\f
Leader: Janine
Certified Trainer!\r
[0103,0000,0000]
